summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU issues with Morpheus devices(VOY5200,VOY8200)
scenario: Language DFU update gets stuck at 99% for 8 minutes on Voyager 5200 and Voyager 8200
description_clean:
Three DFU issues with Voyager 5200 and Voyager 8200 (Morpheus devices):

1. Language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes before completing. Language changes that previously took 1-2 minutes now take 10 minutes or more.

2. After a successful device firmware update, the app still shows an available update for the headset, instead of showing the device as up to date.

3. When a device firmware update is attempted during an active phone call, the DFU process gets stuck at 26% instead of showing a popup message: "Cannot update this device during a call".
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect a Voyager 5200 or Voyager 8200 headset
Go to Device Settings for the connected headset
Observe the progress bar during the language update
actual: Language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes before completing, taking 10 minutes or more total.
